code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import API from"../api/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AdminDashboard(){const[kpis,setKpis]=useState({});useEffect(()=>{API.get("/admin/kpis?date=2025-09-02").then(res=>setKpis(res.data)).catch(err=>console.log(err));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl font-bold mb-2",children:"Admin KPIs"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("ul",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["Avg Wait Time: ",kpis.avg_wait_time," min"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["Buses Used: ",kpis.buses_used]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["Load Factor: ",kpis.load_factor]})]})]});}export default AdminDashboard;
